notes:
BW-era set (Black & White - Dark Explorers, BW5, released 2012-05-09). PACK STRUCTURE: 10 cards/pack, BW-era standard = 5 common + 3 uncommon + 1 reverse-holo + 1 rare-or-better (Bulbapedia booster-pack page + community consensus: every intl pack guarantees 1 rare-or-better, 3 uncommon, 1 reverse-holo, remainder commons). Booster box = 36 packs. NO Elite Trainer Box existed for this set: ETBs debuted with Plasma Storm (Feb 2013), AFTER Dark Explorers, so etbPacks=null; displayPacks=36 (booster box). PTCGi did not make booster bundles for this set either.

AVAILABLE BUCKETS (given): {common:33, uncommon:35, rare-holo:9, rare:19, ex:6, ultra-rare:6, secret-rare:3}. The set has 6 Pokemon-EX (regular EX -> 'ex' bucket), 6 Full Art EX (Ultra Rare -> 'ultra-rare' bucket), and 3 Secret Rares (the 'shiny' Shaymin-style cracked-ice cards: Gardevoir 109/108, Archeops 110/108, Pokemon Catcher (Gold) 111/108).

RARE-OR-BETTER SLOT (the single 1 rare-or-better card) resolves across {rare, rare-holo, ex, ultra-rare, secret-rare}:
  - ex (regular Pokemon-EX) = 0.0556 (~2 per 36-pack box). Community consensus (PokeGym 'Dark Explorers ex/shiny pull rate' thread; PokeBeach English-box pull-rates thread; relayed via search) = ~3 EX per Dark Explorers box, split as 1 Full Art + 2 regular EX. 2/36 = 0.0556.
  - ultra-rare (Full Art EX) = 0.0278 (~1 per box, ~1:36 packs). Same community '1 Full Art per box' consensus; cross-checks against Flipside Gaming's documented Black & White Ultra Rare rate of approximately 1:36 packs. 1/36 = 0.0278.
  - secret-rare (shiny) = 0.0093 (~1 per 3 boxes, ~1:108 packs). Search-surfaced Dark Explorers reports place the shinies at roughly one-in-three boxes; matches Flipside's note that BW-era secret rares (~1:72 (~1 per 2 boxes per Flipside)) sit below the ultra-rare rate. 1/108 = 0.0093.
  - rare-holo = 0.333 (~1:3 packs, ~12 holos per box). Standard BW/EX-era holo convention (~1 holo every 3 packs), consistent with 9 rare-holos in the set. 12/36 = 0.333.
  - rare (non-holo) = remainder = 1 - 0.0556 - 0.0278 - 0.0093 - 0.333 = 0.5743. Slot sums to exactly 1.0.

REVERSE-HOLO SLOT: per dataset convention (see ex-firered-leafgreen.json / black-bolt.json), reverse-holo filler is modeled with plain common/uncommon ids since their market value is what the EV engine reads. Near-equal pools (33 common / 35 uncommon) -> neutral 0.5/0.5 split. Sums to 1.0.

CONFIDENCE 'low': no per-set published pull-rate STUDY exists for this vintage 2012 set. The EX-per-box (1 FA + 2 regular), shiny ~1-in-3-boxes, and holo ~1:3 figures are BW-era community/retailer averages (PokeGym, PokeBeach, Flipside Gaming aggregation) mapped onto Dark Explorers, not a Dark-Explorers-specific large sample. Vintage sealed Dark Explorers booster boxes carry a heavy collector/sealed premium, so EV/booster will sit far below box price - that is EXPECTED; rates are NOT inflated to compensate.

INTEGRITY: every slot sums to exactly 1.0; all distribution keys {common, uncommon, rare, rare-holo, ex, ultra-rare, secret-rare} are a strict subset of this set's available buckets. No invented per-set percentages - the EX/FA-per-box, shiny-incidence, and holo ~1:3 ordering are the sourced era figures.
